name: forgechat
description: RTCForge apps monorepo — five real-time products (chat, live streaming, collaborative, meet, massive) built on the rtcforge stack. Node backends + React/Chakra frontends, sharing packages/rtc-shared.

scripts.dev:1: concurrently -k -n 1-chat-be,1-chat-fe -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C apps/1-chat/backend dev" "pnpm -C apps/1-chat/frontend dev"
scripts.dev:2: concurrently -k -n 2-live-be,2-live-fe -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C apps/2-live-streaming/backend dev" "pnpm -C apps/2-live-streaming/frontend dev"
scripts.dev:3: concurrently -k -n 3-collab-be,3-collab-fe -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C apps/3-collaborative/backend dev" "pnpm -C apps/3-collaborative/frontend dev"
scripts.dev:4: concurrently -k -n 4-meet-be,4-meet-fe -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C apps/4-meet/backend dev" "pnpm -C apps/4-meet/frontend dev"
scripts.dev:5: concurrently -k -n 5-massive-be,5-massive-fe -c blue,magenta "pnpm -C apps/5-massive/backend dev" "pnpm -C apps/5-massive/frontend dev"
scripts.test: pnpm test:1 && pnpm test:2 && pnpm test:3 && pnpm test:4 && pnpm test:5
